## Safety checklist

- [ ] I reviewed any G-code, serial, homing, probing, spindle, heater, or laser behavior changed by this PR.
- [ ] I tested with mock/offline mode or safe hardware conditions when relevant.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing changes.

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
